# Nowruz Wiki — llms.txt
# https://nowruz.wiki
# A free, open-source encyclopedia about the Persian New Year (Nowruz).

> Nowruz Wiki is an open-source project dedicated to preserving and sharing
> the 3,000-year traditions of Nowruz — the Persian New Year celebrated by
> over 300 million people worldwide. It covers history, rituals, foods,
> folklore, science, and global celebrations.

## Main Pages

- Homepage: https://nowruz.wiki
- History of Nowruz: https://nowruz.wiki/history
- Haft-Seen Table: https://nowruz.wiki/haft-sin
- Chaharshanbe Suri (Festival of Fire): https://nowruz.wiki/chaharshanbe-suri
- Nowruz Foods: https://nowruz.wiki/nowruz-foods
- The Science Behind Nowruz: https://nowruz.wiki/science
- Sizdah Bedar (Day 13): https://nowruz.wiki/sizdah-bedar
- Wiki Index: https://nowruz.wiki/wiki

## Wiki Articles (Raw Markdown via API)

### Culture
- Overview: https://nowruz.wiki/api/content?page=overview
- Nowruz Greetings and Phrases: https://nowruz.wiki/api/content?page=nowruz-greetings-and-phrases
- Nowruz in Poetry: https://nowruz.wiki/api/content?page=nowruz-in-poetry
- Zoroastrianism and Nowruz: https://nowruz.wiki/api/content?page=zoroastrianism-and-nowruz

### Folklore
- Amoo Nowruz: https://nowruz.wiki/api/content?page=amoo-nowruz
- Haji Firooz: https://nowruz.wiki/api/content?page=haji-firuz
- King Jamshid: https://nowruz.wiki/api/content?page=king-jamshid
- Nane Sarma: https://nowruz.wiki/api/content?page=nane-sarma

### Food
- Ash-e Reshteh: https://nowruz.wiki/api/content?page=ashe-reshteh
- Kuku Sabzi: https://nowruz.wiki/api/content?page=kuku-sabzi
- Sabzi Polo ba Mahi: https://nowruz.wiki/api/content?page=sabzi-polo-maahi
- Traditional Nowruz Pastries: https://nowruz.wiki/api/content?page=traditional-nowruz-pastries

### Global
- Nowruz in Afghanistan: https://nowruz.wiki/api/content?page=nowruz-in-afganestan
- Nowruz in Central Asia & Azerbaijan: https://nowruz.wiki/api/content?page=nowruz-in-central-asia-and-azerbaijan
- Nowruz in Kurdistan: https://nowruz.wiki/api/content?page=nowruz-in-kurdestan

### Traditions
- Chaharshanbe Suri: https://nowruz.wiki/api/content?page=chaharshanbe-suri
- Eidi (New Year Gift): https://nowruz.wiki/api/content?page=eidi-new-year-gift
- Haft-Sin: https://nowruz.wiki/api/content?page=haft-sin
- Sizdah Bedar: https://nowruz.wiki/api/content?page=sizdah-bedar
- Tahvil-e Saal: https://nowruz.wiki/api/content?page=tahvil-saal

## API

- Content API: https://nowruz.wiki/api/content
  - GET /api/content → JSON index of all available articles
  - GET /api/content?page={slug} → Raw markdown content of a specific article

## Source Code

- GitHub: https://github.com/thekeyvan/nowruz-wiki
